revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月初七]][[zh:正月初七]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 7|qq=January 7}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[孝安天皇]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} [[紀元前392]] {{ill|March 3|en|March 3|qid=Q2391|lt=March 3|1=March 3}}) – The 6th Emperor of Japan, [[孝安天皇]], is said to have ascended the throne. * {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|qid=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō-jingo|1=Tenpyō-jingo}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|765|en|765|qid=Q31216|lt=765|1=765}} {{ill|February 1|en|February 1|qid=Q2312|lt=February 1|1=February 1}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|qid=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji|1=Tenpyō-hōji}} to {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|qid=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō-jingo|1=Tenpyō-jingo}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|January 31|en|January 31|qid=Q2289|lt=January 31|1=January 31}}) – After defeating the bakufu forces at the [[:en:鳥羽・伏見の戦い|鳥羽・伏見の戦い]], the new government issued an order against the Tokugawa shogun, {{ill|Yoshinobu|ja|将軍慶喜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, calling for his prosecution.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} 12nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1543|en|1543|qid=Q6523|lt=1543|1=1543}} {{ill|February 10|en|February 10|qid=Q2325|lt=February 10|1=February 10}}) – The monk {{ill|Kōsa|en|Kōsa|qid=Q1045296|lt=Kōsa|1=Kōsa}}, a Jōdo Shinshū priest who later raised an army against {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} (died {{ill|1592|en|1592|qid=Q6769|lt=1592|1=1592}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}} {{ill|February 4|en|February 4|qid=Q2318|lt=February 4|1=February 4}}) – [[Maejima Hisoka]], the founder of Japan’s modern postal system (died {{ill|1919|en|1919|qid=Q2157|lt=1919|1=1919}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1859|en|1859|qid=Q7687|lt=1859|1=1859}} {{ill|February 9|en|February 9|qid=Q2324|lt=February 9|1=February 9}}) – [[Akiyama Kōko]], a military officer (died 1930). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|February 11|en|February 11|qid=Q2335|lt=February 11|1=February 11}}) – [[Ueda Man]], a linguist (died {{ill|1937|en|1937|qid=Q18647|lt=1937|1=1937}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Entoku|en|Entoku|qid=Q431465|lt=Entoku|1=Entoku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1490|en|1490|qid=Q6669|lt=1490|1=1490}} {{ill|January 27|en|January 27|qid=Q2284|lt=January 27|1=January 27}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimasa|en|Ashikaga Yoshimasa|qid=Q447034|lt=Ashikaga Yoshimasa|1=Ashikaga Yoshimasa}}, the 8th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1436|en|1436|qid=Q6369|lt=1436|1=1436}}). * Entoku 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1491|en|1491|qid=Q6676|lt=1491|1=1491}} {{ill|February 15|en|February 15|qid=Q2334|lt=February 15|1=February 15}}) – [[Ashikaga Yoshishi]], a military commander (born {{ill|1439|en|1439|qid=Q6380|lt=1439|1=1439}}). * [[順治]] 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1661|en|1661|qid=Q7005|lt=1661|1=1661}} {{ill|February 6|en|February 6|qid=Q2320|lt=February 6|1=February 6}}) – [[Shunzheng Emperor]], the 3rd Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born {{ill|1638|en|1638|qid=Q6893|lt=1638|1=1638}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1825|en|1825|qid=Q6997|lt=1825|1=1825}} {{ill|February 24|en|February 24|qid=Q2355|lt=February 24|1=February 24}}) – {{ill|Utagawa Toyokuni|en|Utagawa Toyokuni|qid=Q950316|lt=Utagawa Toyokuni|1=Utagawa Toyokuni}}, a master of ukiyo-e (born {{ill|1769|en|1769|qid=Q7679|lt=1769|1=1769}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Jinjitsu|en|Jinjitsu|qid=Q13423431|lt=Jinjitsu|1=Jinjitsu}} * 七日正月
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|6|1|8|12|7|2|1|0107|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ar:January 7 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月初七]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月初七]] {{wikidata link|Q839064}} [[Category: Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days 7 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
